decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield using reanimation spells. Utilizing cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Restless Reef, along with Winternight Stories and Bitter Triumph to fill the graveyard, you can then use cards like Superior Spider-Man and Requiting Hex to bring these creatures back for a devastating combo. This deck also includes some control elements like Duress and Deadly Cover-Up to disrupt your opponent's game plan while you build up your own.

The key concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively control the board with efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics while utilizing creatures like Drake Hatcher and Slickshot Show-Off to apply pressure. The deck aims to maintain tempo with bounce spells like Bounce Off and Eddymurk Crab, while also taking advantage of card draw and selection tools like Opt and Sleight of Hand. The inclusion of spells like Flow State and Stormchaser's Talent enhance the deck's aggression and ability to close out games swiftly.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively attack the opponent using cheap and efficient spells and creatures. The deck focuses on utilizing instant spells like Burst Lightning and Flow State along with creatures like Stormchaser's Talent and Drake Hatcher to deal damage quickly and efficiently. With cards like Sleight of Hand and Opt to help with card draw and consistency, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its aggression and tempo, while also having disruptive elements like Boomerang Basics and Spell Pierce to control the battlefield.

This deck focuses on utilizing a mix of counterspells, removal, and card draw to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By efficiently managing resources and reacting to threats, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and maintain control of the board. Cards like Traumatic Critique and Sleight of Hand help dig for important pieces, while cards like Burst Lightning and Hearth Elemental provide removal options. Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock provide additional disruption and defense, while Prismari Charm offers versatility. Overall, the deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and secure victory through strategic gameplay.

The key strategy of this Azorius Aggro deck is to quickly develop a board presence with low-cost creatures like Sage of the Skies and Momo, Friendly Flier, supported by card draw engines like Get Lost and Floodfarm Verge. The deck utilizes tempo plays with cards like Daydream and Practiced Offense to maintain pressure on the opponent while also providing disruption with Seam Rip and removal with Cosmogrand Zenith. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its flying creatures and efficient spells, eventually closing out the game with powerful finishers like Starfield Shepherd and Haliya, Guided by Light.

The main focus of this deck is to maintain control over the game through a combination of cards that disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect your own assets. By utilizing cards like Duress and Requiting Hex to strip your opponent's hand of key cards, and Deadly Cover-Up and Superior Spider-Man to control the board, the deck aims to outmaneuver the opponent and secure victory. In addition, the presence of powerful finishers like Qarsi Revenant and Agna Qel'a ensure that you have the tools needed to close out the game once you have gained control.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, while also disrupting their game plan with bounce spells and counterspells. By combining cheap and efficient creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off with spells like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain control of the board. The inclusion of cards like Get Out and Impractical Joke provide additional disruption and utility, giving the deck multiple avenues to victory.

The main focus of this Jeskai Control deck is to maintain control of the game through a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counter magic. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by efficiently dealing with threats and generating card advantage. By utilizing cards like Tablet of Discovery and Accumulate Wisdom, the deck can dig for key pieces while preventing the opponent from gaining momentum. Jeskai Revelation, Combustion Technique, and Firebending Lesson provide powerful win conditions to close out the game once control is established. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's color requirements and provide flexibility in casting spells.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of low-cost creatures and powerful creatures with abilities that support each other. By utilizing ramp cards like Llanowar Elves and Temple Garden, the deck can establish a strong board presence early on. Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Gene Pollinator provide additional value through their abilities, while cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Practiced Offense help push through damage. The inclusion of removal spells like Soul-Guide Lantern and Seam Rip ensures that the deck can deal with threats while maintaining pressure on the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize various spells and creatures to quickly replenish your hand, disrupt your opponent's strategy with hand disruption and removal spells, and then bring back powerful creatures from the graveyard to overwhelm your opponent. The deck focuses on maximizing efficiency and consistency in executing its combo strategy through card draw, disruption, and reanimation spells, ultimately aiming to create a board state that gives you a strong advantage in the match.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures and spells, and then bring them back to the battlefield using reanimation effects. Cards like Bitter Triumph and Superior Spider-Man provide ways to discard cards and fill the graveyard, while cards like Requiting Hex and Doomsday Excruciator allow for powerful creatures to be reanimated. The deck also includes disruption tools like Duress and Deadly Cover-Up to protect the combo pieces. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a sudden influx of powerful creatures and spells from the graveyard.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of powerful spells and card advantage. By using cards like Accumulate Wisdom and Jeskai Revelation, the player can draw additional cards and generate resources to outlast their opponent. Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson provide removal and damage options, while cards like Confounding Riddle and Spell Pierce disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes utility cards like Tablet of Discovery and Stock Up to further manipulate resources and maintain control of the game.

This deck focuses on establishing a strong board presence quickly through aggressive creatures and efficient mana ramp. It combines powerful Selesnya creatures with mana acceleration to overwhelm opponents in the early to mid-game. By utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge, the deck aims to curve out quickly and put pressure on the opponent. Cards like Practiced Offense and Badgermole Cub provide additional aggression, while Gene Pollinator and Brightglass Gearhulk offer late-game threats and resilience. The strategy is to be proactive and apply pressure, forcing opponents to react to your threats.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill your graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back to the battlefield using reanimation spells like Requiting Hex and Winternight Stories. Cards like Day of Black Sun and Stock Up help you draw into your combo pieces, while Bitter Triumph and Insatiable Avarice provide additional value when you bring your creatures back. Deceit and Restless Reef help you control the board while setting up your combo. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm your opponent with powerful reanimated creatures.

This deck focuses on countering opponent's spells and controlling the board with removal spells like Burst Lightning and Traumatic Critique. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide additional threats on the board while cards like Prismari Charm and Opt help with card advantage and filtering. The deck also includes cards like Get Out and Impractical Joke for additional disruption. The land base is built for consistency with lands like Steam Vents and Riverpyre Verge. Overall, this deck aims to control the game and pressure the opponent with its diverse spell suite.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with aggressive plays using cheap spells and creatures. Utilize cards like Burst Lightning and Sleight of Hand to control the board while deploying threats such as Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to apply pressure. The deck aims to maintain a fast tempo by bouncing opposing threats with cards like Boomerang Basics and Get Out, all while setting up card advantage with cards like Opt and Stormchaser's Talent. The combination of red and blue spells creates a versatile and unpredictable playstyle to keep opponents on their toes.
